name: Safe synthetic playbook: Public RDP listener detected
description: Attack-surface simulation where an external recon scan observes an RDP-like port exposed to the internet on a labeled lab asset. No exploitation steps, port numbers are descriptive metadata only.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Agent-1 style scan fixture records reachable remote-desktop service fingerprint on asset lab-win-rdp-01.
Finding normalized as high-risk exposure awaiting ownership mapping.
Simulator proposes bastion/VPN posture and firewall rule simulation.

events_emitted.headline: External discovery observation
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Benign scan artifact; no connection attempts beyond handshake metadata in lab.

events_emitted.headline: Normalized exposure finding
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Inventory links the host to a mock business unit for routing.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: External surface signal ingested for lab asset.
High exposure drives incident queue simulation.

expected_controls_triggered.control_label: Ensure RDP access is restricted (mapped conceptually)

expected_remediation.summary: Close public path via firewall/group policy simulation, enforce VPN-only access pattern, validate with rescan artifact.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Draft firewall deny rule for LAB profile (not applied globally).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Network changes may disrupt operators; CAB-style approval modeled.

expected_final_report.title: Public RDP exposure — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Lab asset showed internet-reachable remote administration; playbook closes with containment plan and governance mapping only.
